name: Deinit for Cleanup
description: Classes holding observers, timers, or subscriptions must clean up in deinit to prevent memory leaks.
auto_fix_hint: Add deinit { } block to cancel subscriptions, invalidate timers, remove observers

name: Combine Subscription Storage
description: Combine publishers must be stored in a Set<AnyCancellable>. Unretained subscriptions are cancelled immediately.
auto_fix_hint: Declare private var cancellables = Set<AnyCancellable>() and use .store(in: &cancellables)

name: Image Memory Management
description: Large UIImages must be explicitly managed. Avoid holding full-resolution images in memory when thumbnails suffice.
auto_fix_hint: Downsample images using ImageIO and use NSCache for bounded in-memory caching

examples.bad: let image = UIImage(named: "hero_image") // 10MB full res in memory
examples.good: let image = downsample(imageAt: url, to: targetSize) // Uses ImageIO for efficiency
